name: ORP Zbik
events: 8 Sep 1939 Zbik (Lt. Cdr Zebrowski) laid 20 mines in Gulf of Gdansk. (1)
25 Sep 1939 Due to the lack of fuel, Zbik was forced to enter the Swedish harbour of Sandhammn where she was kept in confinement until the end of the war. (1)
1 Oct 1939 The German minesweeper M85 hit a mine laid by Zbik on 8 September 1939 and sank of the Hel Peninsula. (24 dead). (1)
